---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    css: styles.css
---

::: {.hero-banner}
# BayesHealth

### Bayesian Hub for Health Sciences

A collaborative hub advancing **Bayesian methods for healthcare, biomedical research, and public health**.  
Connecting researchers, statisticians, clinicians, and students to **learn, collaborate, and apply modern Bayesian strategies**.

[Explore Methods & Research Wings](#research-wings){.btn-primary}
:::

---

## About BayesHealth

::: {.callout-important appearance="simple"}

**BayesHealth** is a collaborative hub focused on **Bayesian statistical methodology and data-driven health research**.  
We aim to **demystify Bayesian approaches** and provide a platform for sharing **tools, tutorials, and research insights**.

Bayesian methods allow researchers to:

- Combine **prior knowledge with data** in a principled way  
- Quantify uncertainty and **make probabilistic predictions**  
- Build **hierarchical, multilevel, and network models**  
- Perform **adaptive and sequential analyses** for efficient decision-making  

Our goal is to create a **community for learning, collaboration, and innovation**, making Bayesian methods accessible to all health researchers and data scientists.

:::

---

## Our Mission

- Communicate and **promote Bayesian methodology** for health research  
- Provide **training, tutorials, and resources** for students and professionals  
- Foster **collaboration across statistics, epidemiology, medicine, and genomics**  
- Showcase **methodological innovations and best practices**  

---

## Research Wings {#research-wings}

BayesHealth organizes its research into **four integrated wings**, each focused on a major domain in health sciences where Bayesian methods provide transformative insights.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

::: {.callout-tip}
### Bayesian Epidemiology & Global Health

Focuses on **population and public health challenges**, disease dynamics, and global health policy using Bayesian approaches.

**Key topics**

- Spatiotemporal modeling of infectious diseases  
- Outbreak detection and epidemic forecasting  
- Cohort studies and survival/time-to-event modeling  
- Population health risk estimation across regions  
- Health policy evaluation, resource allocation, and intervention planning  
- Hierarchical modeling for multi-region/global comparisons

:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

::: {.callout-tip}
### Bayesian Clinical Trials & Adaptive Designs

Focuses on **designing, monitoring, and analyzing clinical research** to improve patient outcomes and trial efficiency.

**Key topics**

- Adaptive and seamless trial designs  
- Bayesian dose-finding and platform trials  
- Interim monitoring, early stopping, and posterior predictive checks  
- Survival analysis and time-to-event endpoints  
- Probabilistic benefit–risk assessment for treatments

:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

::: {.callout-tip}
### Bayesian Health Economics & Decision Science

Focuses on **decision-making under uncertainty**, supporting cost-effective healthcare and policy evaluation.

**Key topics**

- Probabilistic cost-effectiveness analysis  
- Health technology assessment (HTA)  
- Value-of-information and risk-benefit modeling  
- Scenario simulations for healthcare strategies  
- Resource allocation and policy planning

:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

::: {.callout-tip}
### Bayesian Genomics, Precision Medicine & Multi-Omics

Focuses on **analyzing complex biological data** to enable personalized medicine and predictive modeling.

**Key topics**

- Genome-wide association studies (GWAS)  
- Probabilistic gene and protein network modeling  
- Hierarchical integration of multi-omics datasets  
- Biomarker discovery and patient stratification  
- Predictive modeling for individualized treatment and outcomes

:::
:::

:::
---

## Collaboration

::: {.callout-info appearance="simple"}

BayesHealth welcomes collaborations and participation from students, researchers, and institutions interested in **learning, applying, and advancing Bayesian methods** in health sciences.

We provide **tutorials, workshops, and open resources** to foster knowledge exchange across statistics, epidemiology, medicine, genomics, and computational sciences.

:::

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
### Contact BayesHealth

If you would like to collaborate or learn more, please fill out the form below:

<form id="contactForm">
  <label for="name">Name:</label><br>
  <input type="text" id="name" name="name" required style="width: 100%; padding:8px; margin-bottom:10px;"><br>

  <label for="email">Email:</label><br>
  <input type="email" id="email" name="email" required style="width: 100%; padding:8px; margin-bottom:10px;"><br>

  <label for="notes">Notes / Message:</label><br>
  <textarea id="notes" name="notes" rows="5" required style="width: 100%; padding:8px; margin-bottom:10px;"></textarea><br>

  <button type="submit" style="padding:10px 20px; background-color:#1f4e79; color:white; border:none; border-radius:6px; cursor:pointer;">Submit</button>
</form>

<p id="response" style="margin-top:10px; color:#2c6e91;"></p>

<script>
document.getElementById('contactForm').addEventListener('submit', function(e){
  e.preventDefault();

  // Get form values
  const name = document.getElementById('name').value.trim();
  const email = document.getElementById('email').value.trim();
  const notes = document.getElementById('notes').value.trim();

  if(name && email && notes){
    // Combine into a CSV-style row
    const row = `"${name}","${email}","${notes}"\n`;

    // Save to a file locally (trigger download)
    const blob = new Blob([row], { type: 'text/plain' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = 'bayeshealth_contacts.txt';
    document.body.appendChild(a);
    a.click();
    document.body.removeChild(a);

    document.getElementById('response').innerText = "Thank you! Your submission has been saved.";
    document.getElementById('contactForm').reset();
  } else {
    document.getElementById('response').innerText = "Please fill in all fields.";
  }
});
</script>
:::
